title: NoXpFlicker
description: Hides the experience bottle model during first-person throw so it doesn't clutter your screen.
body:
# 🧪 No XP Bottle Flicker

**Tired of the experience bottle flashing in your face every time you throw one?**
This tiny resource pack makes the bottle invisible during the throw — while keeping it completely normal everywhere else.

---

## ✅ What it does

- Hides the XP bottle model **only** during first-person throw and while it's in the air
- Bottle still looks normal in your **inventory and hotbar**
- No changes to sounds, particles, or splash effects — the XP still pops out as usual

## ❌ What it doesn't do

- Bottles lying on the **ground** will also be invisible (minor side effect)
- Does **not** affect the bottle in third-person view

---

## 🎯 Who is this for?

Crystal PvP players, speedrunners, anyone who throws XP bottles frequently and finds the close-up model distracting or visually cluttered during fights.

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the `.zip` file
2. Place it in `.minecraft/resourcepacks/`
3. Enable it in **Options → Resource Packs**
4. No mods required — works on any client

---

## 🔧 Compatibility

| Version | Status |
|--------|--------|
| 1.21.x | ✅ Supported |
| 1.20.x | ⚠️ Change `pack_format` to `18` in `pack.mcmeta` |

Works with **Sodium**, **OptiFine**, **Iris**, and vanilla.
Compatible with other resource packs — just make sure this one is **above** any pack that also modifies `experience_bottle.json`.

---

> Made with one goal in mind: less visual noise, more focus.
>
